title: 01] To consider the nominations of: Mr. Matthew L....
description: Full Committee Hearing on May 1, 2025 at 5:30 AM
text:
Full Committee Hearing
To consider the nominations of: Mr. Matthew L. Lohmeier to be Under Secretary of Air Force; Mr. Justin P. Overbaugh to be Deputy Under Secretary of Defense for Intelligence and Security; and Mr. Daniel L. Zimmerman to be Assistant Secretary of Defense for International Security Affairs
